# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Resources/deployments
    apiVersion: 2021-04-01
    name: azureFunctionsDeployment
    properties:
      mode: Incremental
      template:
        $schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
        contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
        resources:
          - type: Microsoft.Web/sites
            apiVersion: 2021-01-15
            name: yourFunctionAppName
            location: [parameters('location')]
            kind: FunctionApp
            identity:
              type: SystemAssigned
            properties:
              serverFarmId: [resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]
              httpsOnly: true
              storageAccount: [resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]

          - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
            apiVersion: 2020-10-01
            name: 'roleAssignmentStorage'
            properties:
              principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-01-15').identity.principalId]"
              roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'Storage Account Contributor')]"
              scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"

          - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
            apiVersion: 2020-10-01
            name: 'roleAssignmentKeyVault'
            properties:
              principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-01-15').identity.principalId]"
              roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'Key Vault Secrets User')]"
              scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"

          - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
            apiVersion: 2020-10-01
            name: 'roleAssignmentSql'
            properties:
              principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-01-15').identity.principalId]"
              roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'SQL Database Contributor')]"
              scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"

          - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
            apiVersion: 2020-10-01
            name: 'roleAssignmentCosmosDB'
            properties:
              principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-01-15').identity.principalId]"
              roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'Cosmos DB Account Reader Role')]"
              scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"

parameters:
  location:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: 'The location for all resources.'
  appServicePlanName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: 'Name of the App Service Plan.'
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: 'Name of the Storage Account.'
  functionAppName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: 'Name of the Function App.'
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: 'Name of the Key Vault.'
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: 'Name of the SQL Server.'
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: 'Name of the SQL Database.'
  cosmosDbAccountName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: 'Name of the Cosmos DB account.'
